business_problem: nCino needed to combine 13 years of banking data and trillions in loan history into compliant, domain-driven banking AI while keeping sensitive financial information under tight control and avoiding generic models that cannot replicate financial-services expertise.
solution_summary: nCino built its banking AI on the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform running entirely inside AWS, keeping 13 years of banking data and trillions in loan history under a single cloud ecosystem to reduce complexity and strengthen compliance. Unity Catalog governs access to sensitive financial data across the platform, while AI/BI Genie democratizes natural-language access to insights for executives, analysts, and relationship managers — letting domain experts query the same governed data foundation that powers nCino's banking AI without leaving the regulated environment.
business_outcome: By standardizing on Databricks on AWS, nCino delivers compliant, domain-driven banking AI that gives full control over sensitive financial information, with Unity Catalog governance and AI/BI Genie putting insights into the hands of executives, analysts, and relationship managers.
architecture_clues: Single-cloud architecture on AWS for compliance simplicity
Unity Catalog governing sensitive financial data
13 years of banking data and trillions in loan history
evidence_quotes: nCino transforms financial services by combining 13 years of banking data and trillions in loan history with Databricks on AWS.

With Unity Catalog governing access and AI/BI Genie democratizing insights, executives, analysts and relationship managers all benefit from domain-driven AI solutions that no generic model can replicate.

solution_components.name: Databricks Data Intelligence Platform
solution_components.role: Hosts 13 years of nCino banking data and trillions in loan history as the foundation for domain-driven banking AI

solution_components.name: Unity Catalog
solution_components.role: Access governance for sensitive financial data inside the single-cloud AWS footprint

solution_components.name: Databricks AI/BI Genie
solution_components.role: Natural-language insight access for executives, analysts, and relationship managers

data_flow: 13 years of nCino banking data and trillions in loan history are kept on the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform running entirely inside AWS, governed end-to-end by Unity Catalog. Domain-driven AI solutions are built on top of this foundation, and AI/BI Genie surfaces insights to executives, analysts, and relationship managers in natural language without leaving the governed single-cloud environment.
integration_points: Single-cloud footprint on AWS (no data leaves the ecosystem)
13 years of nCino banking data and trillions in loan history as inputs
Executives, analysts, and relationship managers as consumers
